project_name: Patent Gate - Pioneer 345 kV Ckt 1 New Line (full-relief cap case)
source: SPP 2024 ITP Assessment Report v1.0 p.18 + p.167 (spp.org/media/2229/2024-itp-assessment-report-v10.pdf)
notes: SPP-selected congestion-relief project for the Watford-Charlie Creek 230 kV constraint (CHAWATCHAPAT / MISO Charlie Creek-Watford M2M flowgate). 33.5 mi NTC-C; cost is SPP 2024$ estimate; O&M assumed 1.5% of capex. Capacity entered above the cap so relief_mwh caps at corridor gross flow: this row asks whether eliminating ALL observed MISO-SWPP seam congestion pays for the line on seam value alone. Line benefits beyond the seam (intra-SPP shadow prices; MISO-side M2M congestion which was MISO's largest 2023 constraint cost; voltage collapse + thermal fixes per ITP) are NOT counted.

project_name: Patent Gate - Pioneer 345 kV Ckt 1 New Line (250 MW seam-relief sensitivity)
source: SPP 2024 ITP Assessment Report v1.0 p.18 + p.167
notes: Sensitivity: only 250 MW of the new line's transfer attributed to MISO-SWPP seam relief (uncapped). Together with the full-relief cap row this brackets the seam-only B/C. Same capex/O&M assumptions as the cap case.
